description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a single job named master using the python:3.13 Docker image. In the job script, first update apt and install libenchant-2-2, then install mypy, interrogate, pytest, coverage, and types-pygments via pip, install the current project in editable mode, list installed packages, run coverage run -m pytest -k \"not jj\", generate a coverage report with --fail-under=61, run mypy on the spelltinkle package, run flake8 on spelltinkle, and finally run interrogate with verbose, markdown, ignore‑missing, format 2.0 on spelltinkle excluding spelltinkle/test. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
